name_cn:
# Ophidia Tote Bag 🔥#
Model: 631685 Size: 38*28*14
GG 2020ss New Ophidia series, as always featuring highly recognizable design elements. Beige/Walnut Supreme high-end PVC with original cowhide eco-friendly material, ample capacity and super roomy!
